problem id: e2b02e13
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) AND NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  01111000 -> 00001111
  10100011 -> 01110100
  10110110 -> 11010110
  00100111 -> 01100100
  01000100 -> 10001000
  10100100 -> 10010100
  01111110 -> 11001111
  01000001 -> 00101000
  00110001 -> 00100110

query: 11110011
predicted answer: 01111110
